name: Jan
tagline: The open answer to LM Studio
description: A desktop ChatGPT alternative that runs entirely offline: a polished chat UI, a local model manager built on llama.cpp, assistants, MCP tool support, and an OpenAI-compatible local API server — with optional cloud model connections when you want them.
why: The strongest fully open (Apache-2.0, relicensed from AGPL) rival to LM Studio, which is closed-source. Local-first with everything on-device, but modern: Tauri, TypeScript and Rust, extensions, remote-provider fallback.
useCases: Private everyday AI chat on a laptop
A local OpenAI-compatible API for development
Mixed local-plus-cloud workflows in one app
audience: General users who want private AI; developers; LM Studio refugees

setup.requirements: An installer for Mac, Windows, or Linux; 8GB+ RAM recommended for 3-7B models; GPU optional

limitations: Desktop-focused (headless is secondary), and output quality is bounded by what your hardware can run. Mobile apps are still maturing.
take: The app to install for someone who wants ChatGPT without the account, the cloud, or the subscription.
